mapper.sql: select inbox_id, user_id, original_name, file_type, file_size, abs_path, status, suggested_name, suggested_path, tag_ids, ai_summary, ai_keywords, confidence, token_cost, error_msg, remark, create_time, update_time from lingdoc_inbox
mapper.insert: insert into lingdoc_inbox (inbox_id, user_id, original_name, file_type, file_size, abs_path, status, suggested_name, suggested_path, tag_ids, ai_summary, ai_keywords, confidence, token_cost, error_msg, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{inboxId}, #{userId}, #{originalName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{absPath}, #{status}, #{suggestedName}, #{suggestedPath}, #{tagIds}, #{aiSummary}, #{aiKeywords}, #{confidence}, #{tokenCost}, #{errorMsg}, #{remark}, datetime('now','localtime'), datetime('now','localtime'))
mapper.delete: delete from lingdoc_inbox where inbox_id in #{id}
